calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2018 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Motion For Default Judgmenet Prove-Up Hearing Gainst Defendant Frigerio; Declaration Of Arkady Itkin In Support Thereof And Exhibits; [Proposed] Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Barbara Frigerio, individually, and Barbara Frigerio, dba Barbara Frigerio Contemporary Art.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Arkady Itkin, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Jeremy Mann, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Barbara Frigerio, individually, or Barbara Frigerio, dba Barbara Frigerio Contemporary Art.
Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract was filed on May 1, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant Barbara Frigerio, dba Barbara Frigerio Contemporary Art on May 18, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant Barbara Frigerio, individually, on July 9, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 10, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Jeremy Mann, and against the Defaulted Defendants Barbara Frigerio, individually, and Barbara Frigerio, dba Barbara Frigerio Contemporary Art, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,350.00.
Attorney Fees - $9,600.00.
Punitive Damages - $100,050.00.
Costs - $940.00.

Total - $140,940.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
